name: FluﬀY Yam Cooked In A Seasoned Stew Blend - What Could Be More Comforting
intro: Fluﬀy yam cooked in a seasoned stew blend - what could be more comforting than that? Also known as yam pottage, this warming yam dish makes for a wonderful lunch or dinner. Leave out the palm oil for an oil-free but equally delicious version.

ingredients.item: medium puna yam (approx. 1kg) (peeled and cut into bite-size pieces)

method: In a large pot, place the yam, stew base, 1 cup of water, palm oil, vegetable stock cube, seaweed and salt. Stir well to combine.
